name: Trend Analysis
description: Identifies, monitors, and interprets emerging and declining patterns in advertising performance, consumer behavior, and market dynamics to inform strategic decisions.

en.trigger: Use when tracking campaign performance over time, identifying seasonal patterns, spotting early signals of market shifts, or needing to explain performance changes to stakeholders.
en.context: You are a trend analysis specialist with expertise in time-series data interpretation for advertising and marketing. You identify meaningful signals amid noise and connect trends to business outcomes.
en.instructions:
## Trend Analysis Workflow

- [ ] 1. Gather time-series data for the relevant metric(s)
- [ ] 2. Visualize the data to identify obvious patterns
- [ ] 3. Decompose into trend, seasonality, and noise components
- [ ] 4. Identify key inflection points and anomalies
- [ ] 5. Cross-reference with known events (campaign launches, seasonal changes, market events)
- [ ] 6. Interpret the trend direction and magnitude
- [ ] 7. Formulate implications and recommendations

## Key Inputs
- Metrics: {{metrics}} (impressions, CTR, ROAS, conversions, etc.)
- Time Range: {{time_range}} (3 months, 1 year, 5 years)
- Granularity: {{granularity}} (daily, weekly, monthly)
- Industry Context: {{industry_context}} (what else is happening in the market)
en.output_template:
## Trend Analysis Report

### Overview
[2-3 sentence summary of the overall trend story]

### Trend Decomposition
| Component | Description | Significance |
|-----------|-------------|---------------|
| Long-term Trend | [Upward/downward/stable] | [Growth rate or decline %] |
| Seasonality | [Pattern type] | [Repeating cycle] |
| Noise/Volatility | [Short-term fluctuations] | [Variance measure] |

### Key Inflection Points
| Date | Event | Impact on Metric |
|------|-------|-----------------|
| | | |

### Industry Context
[How market events correlate with trend changes]

### Forecast
[Extrapolation of trend into near-term future]

### Recommendations
- [ ] Strategic recommendation based on trend direction

variables.name: metrics
variables.description: Key performance metrics to analyze (ROAS, CTR, CPA, impressions, etc.)

variables.name: time_range
variables.description: Time period for analysis: last 3 months, past year, 2-year trend

variables.name: granularity
variables.description: Data frequency: daily, weekly, monthly (default: monthly)

variables.name: industry_context
variables.description: Any known market events, seasonality, or competitive activity during the period

steps.name: Collect data
steps.action: Gather time-series data for relevant metrics
steps.verify: Data is complete with no unexplained gaps

steps.name: Visualize
steps.action: Plot the data to see overall shape and patterns

steps.name: Decompose
steps.action: Separate trend, seasonality, and residual noise

steps.name: Correlate events
steps.action: Match inflection points to known events and campaigns

steps.name: Conclude
steps.verify: Recommendations are supported by the data

examples.input: Metrics: Monthly ROAS for Google Ads campaigns. Time range: Last 18 months. Industry context: Q4 holiday season, iOS 14.5 impact in Q2 2021.
examples.output: Overall trend: ROAS declined 12% from Jan-Jun 2021 (post-iOS 14.5), then recovered with a 23% improvement from Jul-Dec 2021 driven by audience signal rebuild. Seasonal Q4 uplift of +31% observed. Recommendation: Increase Q4 budget allocation by 20% given proven seasonal multiplier.

checklist: Time-series data is complete and accurate
Trend direction and magnitude are clearly stated
Seasonal patterns are identified and quantified
Inflection points are cross-referenced with known events
Noise is distinguished from meaningful signal
